# noi-map-layer-announcements



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

(INTERNAL) render map layer

## Events

| Event          | Description                        | Type                   |
| -------------- | ---------------------------------- | ---------------------- |
| `layerLoading` | Emitted when layer data is loading | `CustomEvent<boolean>` |


## Dependencies
